title: Super Micro Jumps on Outlook Signaling Costs Under Control
description: Super Micro Computer Inc. shares leaped in extended trading after the company reported improved margins and gave a profit forecast that suggested it’s controlling the costs of getting powerful AI servers into customers’ hands.

title: AMD Rallies Anew After AI Demand Fuels Blockbuster Forecast
description: Advanced Micro Devices Inc., the leading challenger to Nvidia Corp. in AI computing chips, soared to new heights in late trading after a flood of data center spending bolstered its sales forecast.

title: Oaktree BDC Marks Down Software Loans, Flags 26% AI Exposure
description: Oaktree Capital Management cut the value of one of its private credit funds by almost 4% as the firm marked down its software assets.
